description_long: This is a police helicopter with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in white and black, featuring the word 'POLICE' prominently on the side. The helicopter has a single main rotor with long, slender blades and a tail boom extending to a tail rotor for stability. The cockpit is enclosed with large, slightly tinted windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing excellent visibility for the crew. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, tubular skids attached to the underside of the fuselage with crossbars for support. The tail section is slim and features a horizontal stabilizer and a small vertical fin. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for urban law enforcement and surveillance operations.
description: A black and white police helicopter with a streamlined body, large cockpit windows, and sturdy landing skids. It features a main rotor, tail rotor, and clear police markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow nose, large cockpit windows, and the main rotor blades extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'POLICE' marking, the full length of the fuselage, and the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the alignment of the main rotor blades.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible cockpit windows, landing skids, and police insignia.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, narrow main rotor blades, likely made of composite material or aluminum, colored black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor present, appears to have two blades in a vertical orientation, colored black, with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two tubular, black landing skids with crossbars for support, made of metal, attached to the underside of the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Large, wraparound cockpit windows with a slight tint, framed in black, providing wide visibility; at least three main window panels are visible.
